name: Zürich (Switzerland)
description: A square field divided diagonally per bend, white above and blue below.
history: The blue-and-white per-bend pattern has been used by Zurich since the 14th century, derived from the city's coat of arms. The same flag is used by both the city and the Canton of Zurich.

features.symbolism: the historic Zurich livery, used since the 14th century
